message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series rolling std + var (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering Series.rolling.{std,var}:

- rolling_std_window_3: 5-element geometric sequence (powers of 2),
  window=3 produces increasing standard deviations as the window
  slides over larger values
- rolling_var_window_3: same input, variance instead of std

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
series.rolling(window).std()/.var()), runs the Rust series.rolling
(window, min_periods).std()/.var(), and asserts parity via
compare_series_expected. SeriesRollingStd / SeriesRollingVar were
already wired through the Series window-op dispatch; this fills the
live-oracle test gap (companion to mean/sum/min/max in 2fc2d7b).

[bd-frankenpandas-xaria]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
